This is on private property. Ask the man who lives here and he will give you as much as you can carry. Very nice. Don't try to sneak in, they have a dog. Access: Private.
Blackberry bushes lining the Pellissippi Greenway, near the Wendy's and gas station Access: Public. Falling Fruit season: June-July.
Growing in with lots of honeysuckle. Check in early to mid summer for berries.
Haw Ridge Park Bicycle Trailhead, Melton Lake Greenway, Oak Ridge, TN 37830, USA

Lots of trees, only a couple are fruiting and the fruits are tiny. Remember, they're only worth harvesting when they readily fall from the tree, don't be picking the unripe babies (the seeds won't grow either)! Access: Public. Falling Fruit season: August-Sept
